home.metaTitle: DYNAMO — Omnichannel Orchestration Platform for Telcos
home.metaDescription: SaaS platform orchestrating intelligent customer journeys connecting data, AI, and channels (SAT Push, WhatsApp, RCS, SMS) for global Telcos.

hero.description: Capture real-time events, build affinity-based audiences and activate AI-powered automated journeys across every channel, with zero friction and full operational orchestration.
hero.flowSatMsg: Your data plan is about to expire. We have a better plan for you.
hero.flowWaMsg: Here are 3 options to activate your new plan:

painPoints.title: The challenges holding your operation back
painPoints.subtitle: You're losing revenue running disconnected channels without intelligence. You're not alone.
painPoints.pain1Desc: SMS, WhatsApp, email and push operate disconnected in your stack. Duplicate messages, fragmented experiences and zero traceability across your channels.
painPoints.pain2Desc: Your campaigns run manually, with long implementation cycles that prevent real-time reaction to your subscribers' events.
painPoints.pain3Desc: Your network, billing and CRM data lives in silos. Segmentation takes your team weeks and clusters become obsolete before activation.
painPoints.pain4Desc: You have no way to measure the full journey of your subscribers: from impression to conversion, the real ROI of each channel stays invisible.

solution.title: A simple flow. Real results.
solution.connectDesc: We plug into your HLR, Billing, CRM, SDP and CDRs into a single data hub. No silos, no delay.
solution.analyzeDesc: Intelligent AI clusters that segment your subscribers in real time based on behavior, usage and lifecycle stage.
solution.convertDesc: Activate automated journeys that orchestrate the right channel, at the right time, for each of your subscribers.
solution.beforeDesc: Personalized activation and welcome for your new subscribers.
solution.duringDesc: Upsell, cross-sell and retention based on your subscribers' real usage.
solution.afterDesc: Intelligent reactivation of your inactive subscribers or those at risk of churn.

differentiators.title: 5 capabilities that transform
differentiators.subtitle: Everything your team needs to orchestrate, automate and measure your subscribers' lifecycle from a single platform.
differentiators.item1Desc: Coordinate, automate and chain experiences across all your Telco and OTT channels. Coherent journeys that eliminate silos and increase the overall effectiveness of every campaign.
differentiators.item2Desc: Measure, compare and optimize your entire conversion funnel in real time. Analyze the performance of each journey as complete funnels: intent, sends, impressions, clicks, conversions and actual sales.
differentiators.item2Tags: Segmented by channel,Segmented by product,Best channel by conversion,Trigger performance
differentiators.item3Desc: Triggers based on your subscribers' real behavior with direct integration to your infrastructure. No manual intervention, in real time.
differentiators.item4Title: Full control with advanced business rules
differentiators.item4Desc: Define how, when and who to target. Time windows, anti-spam filters, whitelists, blacklists and segmentation rules based on profile, behavior and affinity.
differentiators.item5Desc: Four ways to activate campaigns on your base: single-channel, programmatic with A/B testing, real-time events and journeys with automations. Define the experience for every subscriber response.

duoCards.title: Solutions for your business model
duoCards.cvmDesc: Give your CVM team full control. Build, launch and measure omnichannel journeys without relying on third parties.
duoCards.vasDesc: Our team operates for you, maximizing your inventory revenue with value-added services and an advertiser ecosystem.
duoCards.vasFeature3: Integrated digital wallet for your subscribers

dynamoPlus.title: We manage your operation as if it were our own
dynamoPlus.subtitle: 100% managed operation by DYNAMO's expert team. We handle everything so you can focus on your business.
dynamoPlus.pillar1Desc: Daily optimization and sales of your inventory to brands and aggregators, including commercial relationship management and collection.
dynamoPlus.pillar2Desc: Continuous optimization of your audiences, channels and flows to maximize the performance of every campaign.
dynamoPlus.pillar3Desc: Direct integration with your Billing, CVM, SDP, HLR, LBS, CDRs and all key platforms in your operation.

satPush.heroDesc: Native SIM notifications with the highest visibility rate on the market. Proprietary OTA Cloud, multiple formats and 95% device compatibility.
satPush.whatDesc: SAT Push is a technology that delivers interactive notifications directly to the phone SIM toolkit. Unlike SMS or push notifications, SAT Push appears as a native device notification with multiple formats and CTAs.
satPush.whatBullet1: Appears on the device main screen
satPush.whatBullet2: No app or mobile data required
satPush.whatBullet3: Multiple formats: display, menu, data collection
satPush.whatBullet4: Direct CTAs: SMS, call, browser, USSD
satPush.phoneActivate: Activate your bonus now and browse without limits until the end of the month.
satPush.diffDesc: 15+ years of expertise, proprietary technology and the largest installed base in the region.
satPush.diff1Desc: Own cloud infrastructure for mass sending and OTA applet management.
satPush.diff2Desc: In-house developed applet, optimized for each operator and market.
satPush.diff3Desc: Works on 95% of market devices, regardless of OS.
satPush.diff4Desc: Compatible with any SIM provider thanks to our OTA Cloud.
satPush.diff5Desc: Display, Menu and Data Collection. Each format optimized for its purpose.
satPush.diff6Desc: Subscriber responds via SMS, call, browser or USSD directly.
satPush.perfDesc: SAT Push as first touch filters audience and dramatically reduces cost per conversion.
satPush.formatDisplayDesc: Visual notification with title, message and up to 2 action buttons. Ideal for offers and alerts.
satPush.formatMenuDesc: Selectable options list. Perfect for surveys, plan selection and navigation.
satPush.formatDataDesc: Form to capture subscriber data: ratings, preferences, feedback.
satPush.compatDesc: Our OTA Cloud makes SIMs that originally do not support SAT Push compatible. Regardless of vendor, generation or format, DYNAMO can enable the channel.
satPush.compatBullet1: SIMs from any vendor: Gemalto, IDEMIA, G+D, others
satPush.compatBullet2: OTA applet provisioning without physical SIM replacement
satPush.compatBullet3: Support for eSIM and remote profiles
satPush.compatBullet4: 15+ years of OTA and SIM toolkit experience
satPush.ctaTitle: The highest-performing channel on the market
satPush.ctaDesc: 15+ years of SAT Push expertise. Discover why the leading operators in the region trust DYNAMO for this channel.
satPush.description: +15 years of expertise in SIM card solutions. Proprietary applet + OTA Cloud. Maximum SIM vendor independence and 95% terminal compatibility.
satPush.metaTitle: SAT Push — Highest-Converting Channel for Telcos
satPush.metaDescription: Native SIM card notifications with proprietary OTA Cloud. Up to 10x more conversion than SMS, 95% compatibility, interactive formats, and actionable CTAs.
satPush.ucDesc: 4 campaign types for every operational need
satPush.ucType1Desc: Quick sale combining any CTA. Ideal for alerts, promotions, news and driving web traffic.
satPush.ucType2Desc: Greater user interaction. Short surveys, discount coupons, offers and pre/post purchase activations.
satPush.ucType3Desc: Long surveys, loyalty campaigns and multi-step user profiling.
satPush.ucType4Desc: Web traffic, branding, app downloads, click to video. Compatible with Android, Windows Phone and feature phones.
satPush.ucCore1Desc: Direct indebted customers to call the service center
satPush.ucCore2Desc: Send teaser with user interests to generate web traffic
satPush.ucCore3Desc: Redirect to SIM Toolkit menu to increase traffic
satPush.ucCore4Desc: Personalized notifications with an extra offer as a second action
satPush.ucCore5Desc: Reduce churn with proactive retention campaigns
satPush.ucCore6Desc: Insurance, smartphone options, data try & buy
satPush.ucCore7Desc: Generate constant revenue from international traffic
satPush.ucCore8Desc: Sell one-shot extra data pack or higher plan
satPush.ucCore9Desc: Sell roaming options based on destination country
satPush.ucBrand2Desc: Banks, credit cards and financial services
satPush.ucEng1Desc: Capture name, age, city and user interests
satPush.ucEng2Desc: Interaction for TV shows and media campaigns
satPush.ucEng3Desc: Profile and offer personalized content based on responses
satPush.ucEng4Desc: Direct to Android Market for app download
satPush.ucMM1Desc: High-quality impressions and traffic for brands
satPush.ucMM2Desc: Acquisition landing pages for Telco products

cta.title: Ready to take your operation to the next level?
cta.subtitle: Book a personalized demo — No commitment

about.heroSubtitle: The transformative power of communication creates impact, builds valuable connections, and leaves a lasting mark. We develop innovative technology solutions that strengthen communication and relationships between companies and their customers, driving growth and continued success.
about.originP1: In 2013, Javier Badaracco and Andres Boffa founded DYNAMO with a clear vision: to transform the way telecommunications companies communicate with their users. They saw a massive gap between Telco infrastructure and intelligent channel orchestration.
about.originP2: What started as a bet on SAT Push technology — a native SIM card channel with massive reach — evolved into a complete omnichannel orchestration platform. Every step was guided by an obsession: solving real problems for real operators.
about.originP3: Today, DYNAMO Journeys is the platform chosen by over 100 operators across three continents, reaching more than 500 million users each month with intelligent, automated, and measurable journeys.
about.timeline2013Desc: Javier Badaracco and Andres Boffa found DYNAMO with the vision of transforming mobile communication for Telcos.
about.timeline2015Desc: Expansion across LATAM, development of the proprietary SAT Push applet and the OTA platform.
about.timeline2017Desc: Established as the #1 SAT Push technology solution in Latin America, operating with 70+ brands.
about.timeline2019Desc: Enter the African market (Ghana, Ivory Coast, South Africa) and European market (Spain, Greece).
about.timeline2022Desc: Dynamo Studio (now Journeys) is born, integrating all channels into a single SaaS platform.
about.timeline2024Desc: Evolution to the omnichannel orchestration platform with AI, real-time triggers, and intelligent automation.
about.timeline2025Desc: 100+ clients, 30+ professionals, presence in 15+ countries, 500M+ users reached per month.
about.valuesQuote: Our values are the guide that defines how we work, make decisions, and connect as a team, ensuring every action is aligned with our vision and purpose as a company.
about.value1Desc: We adopt a proactive attitude to overcome challenges and generate real results.
about.value2Desc: We collaborate with trust and respect, aligned toward a common goal.
about.value3Desc: We value transparency, honest feedback, and constructive conversations.
about.value4Title: We care about what we do
about.value4Desc: We dedicate attention and passion to every detail, delivering quality in everything we undertake.
about.value5Desc: We see every challenge as an opportunity to learn, adapt, and evolve.
about.value6Desc: We strive to redefine boundaries, adopting technologies and approaches that drive our impact.
about.value7Desc: We put the customer at the center of everything, anticipating their needs and creating solutions that exceed expectations.
about.value8Desc: We believe that fun, humor, and nurturing good relationships play an essential role in achieving shared success.
about.leader1Desc: Strategic vision and global business development.
about.leader4Desc: Commercial expansion in Central America and Latin America.
about.leader5Desc: Financial management, administration and management control.
about.teamTitle: The team that makes it happen
about.ctaTitle: Want to be part of it?
about.ctaSubtitle: Discover how DYNAMO can help your Telco operation reach its full potential.

footer.description: The omnichannel orchestration platform that integrates your tech stack with every channel and AI.

journeys.heroDesc: The platform that connects data, channels and AI to orchestrate every interaction with your subscribers. Real omnichannel, full governance, measurable results.
journeys.channelsDesc: Every communication channel connected to a single rules engine, analytics and AI.
journeys.chWhatsApp: Interactive conversations with rich media, buttons and automated flows.
journeys.chSATPush: Native SIM notifications with 95% device compatibility.
journeys.chRCS: Rich messaging with carousels, maps and quick actions.
journeys.chSMS: Massive and universal reach, the most reliable channel in the ecosystem.
journeys.chEmail: Personalized HTML campaigns with full engagement tracking.
journeys.chInstagram: Automated direct messages for social media engagement.
journeys.chMessenger: Chatbots and notifications within the Facebook ecosystem.
journeys.chUSSD: Interactive menus without data, ideal for emerging markets.
journeys.campaignDesc: Four execution modes in a single interface. No tool switching needed.
journeys.campSingleDesc: One-off campaigns on a single channel. Segmentation, scheduling, templates and A/B testing included.
journeys.campProgramDesc: Continuous experimentation engine. Automatically test copy, channels, timing and audiences.
journeys.campEventsDesc: Instant triggers on subscriber events: top-up, plan change, data expiry, roaming.
journeys.campJourneysDesc: Multi-step flows with branching, delays, conditionals and full omnichannel orchestration.
journeys.rulesDesc: Full control over when, how and who gets contacted. Built-in subscriber protection.
journeys.ruleWindowingDesc: Time slots and send days by channel and country
journeys.ruleAntispamDesc: Frequency limits per subscriber, channel and period
journeys.ruleListsDesc: Exclusion and inclusion lists managed via API or UI
journeys.ruleChannelPriorityDesc: Define preferred channel and automatic fallbacks when primary channel is unavailable
journeys.ruleBandwidthDesc: Channel-specific configuration or global load balancer, segmented by Telco area
journeys.ruleSdpBillingDesc: Scoring by product affinity and user quality based on SDP and Billing data
journeys.ruleAiSegmentationDesc: Smart clusters based on Telco infrastructure data and results from campaigns and journeys executed in DYNAMO
journeys.ruleUserTypeDesc: Segmentation by prepaid or postpaid, device type and geographic location
journeys.analyticsDesc: From intent to actual sale. Complete visibility of the subscriber journey.
journeys.demoDesc: This is what a real journey looks like configured in Dynamo Journeys.
journeys.ctaTitle: Take your communication to the next level
journeys.ctaDesc: Book a personalized demo and discover how Dynamo Journeys transforms the relationship with your subscribers.
journeys.metaTitle: DYNAMO Journeys — Omnichannel Orchestration for Telcos
journeys.metaDescription: Customer journey orchestration platform for mobile operators. Waterfall messaging, real-time events, AI segmentation, and full-funnel analytics.

cvm.heroDesc: Self-service for your team. Governance for your operation. Campaigns that move ARPU, reduce churn and improve NPS — without relying on IT.
cvm.pain1Desc: Multiple teams sending without central governance. Subscribers receive redundant messages, generating opt-outs and churn.
cvm.pain2Desc: Each campaign requires IT tickets, manual integrations and weeks of waiting. Opportunities are lost.
cvm.pain3Desc: Partial metrics per channel. Impossible to measure real revenue impact or optimize the full funnel.
cvm.solutionTitle: How Journeys solves each pain point
cvm.solutionDesc: Self-service for the CVM team. Governance for the operation. Results for the business.
cvm.feat1Desc: Instant triggers on subscriber changes: top-up, plan change, data expiry.
cvm.feat2Desc: Limits per user, channel and period. Built-in anti-spam and windowing.
cvm.feat3Desc: Configurable time slots, frequency caps, full subscriber respect.
cvm.feat4Desc: Automatic clusters with machine learning + combined manual rules.
cvm.feat5Desc: Single, A/B, events and journeys in one self-service interface.
cvm.feat6Desc: From intent to actual sale. Metrics by channel, campaign and segment.
cvm.useCasesDesc: Pre-configured journeys ready to adapt to your operation.
cvm.uc1Desc: Detect high-usage subscribers and offer upgrades at the optimal moment.
cvm.uc2Desc: Alert before cut-off and propose additional data packs or top-up.
cvm.uc3Desc: Identify flight risk and activate multi-channel retention journeys.
cvm.uc4Desc: Guide new subscribers step by step: activation, first use, benefits.
cvm.uc5Desc: Post-interaction surveys and recovery journeys for detractors.
cvm.uc6Desc: Top-up campaigns with personalized offers based on usage patterns.
cvm.integrationsDesc: Journeys integrates with the operator core systems via standard APIs.
cvm.ctaDesc: Discover how CVM teams at tier-1 operators already use Journeys to reduce churn and increase ARPU.
cvm.metaTitle: CVM & CORE — Customer Value Management for Telcos
cvm.metaDescription: Self-service CVM platform for value management teams. Churn prevention, upselling, next best offer, AI segmentation, and real-time events.

vas.heroDesc: Expert operation and a marketplace where content providers access premium operator inventory with bidding, analytics and integrated DCB.
vas.howDesc: DYNAMO operates as a managed service: we manage the daily operation and sell inventory to content providers.
vas.how1Desc: Our team manages inventory, optimizes campaigns and controls delivery to maximize revenue.
vas.how2Desc: Content providers and aggregators compete for inventory through the bidding platform.
vas.how3Desc: Automatic A/B testing, ROI tracking and real-time adjustments to maximize performance.
vas.cpDesc: Self-service tools to maximize ROI on every VAS content campaign.
vas.cp1Desc: Compete for inventory in real time with CPM, CPC and CPA bids.
vas.cp2Desc: Prepaid and postpaid with automatic top-up. Full spend control.
vas.cp3Desc: Live dashboard with delivery, engagement and conversion metrics.
vas.cp4Desc: Approval system with integrated A/B testing before going to production.
vas.cp5Desc: Return metrics by campaign, channel and segment. Data-driven optimization.
vas.cp6Desc: Native Direct Carrier Billing. Direct charge to subscriber bill.
vas.modelsDesc: Three monetization models adapted to each campaign objective.
vas.cpmDesc: Pay for reach. Ideal for VAS content awareness and branding.
vas.cpcDesc: Pay for engagement. Perfect for content discovery campaigns.
vas.cpaDesc: Pay for results. Subscriptions, purchases or confirmed activations.
vas.ctaDesc: Whether you are an operator looking for managed services or a content provider looking for premium inventory, let's talk.
vas.metaTitle: VAS — Value-Added Services Platform for Telecoms
vas.metaDescription: Expert operation of value-added services. Content provider marketplace with DCB, transparent bidding, virtual wallet, and ROI dashboard.

otaSim.heroDesc: 15+ years of SIM card solutions expertise. Proprietary applet and OTA cloud platform ensuring maximum SIM vendor independence.
otaSim.whatTitle: What is SAT Push and how it works
otaSim.whatDesc: SAT Push (SIM Application Toolkit Push) is a technology that delivers interactive notifications directly to the phone SIM toolkit. No app, mobile data or smartphone required — works on any phone with a SIM card.
otaSim.whatBullet2: No app, mobile data or smartphone required
otaSim.whatBullet3: Works on any phone with a SIM card
otaSim.whatBullet4: The highest-performing channel for the Operator: 2-10x higher conversion than SMS
otaSim.phoneActivateDesc: Activate your bonus now and browse without limits until the end of the month.
otaSim.appletDesc: DYNAMO has a proprietary SIM card application applet that enables the SAT Push channel on SIM cards that originally do not support it.
otaSim.appletBullet1: Maximum SIM vendor independence — no dependency on SIM manufacturer
otaSim.appletBullet2: Installable via OTA (Over The Air) without SIM replacement
otaSim.appletBullet3: Enables SAT Push on SIM cards that originally do not support it
otaSim.appletBullet4: In-house developed applet with 15+ years of expertise
otaSim.otaDesc: Proprietary cloud infrastructure for management, mass sending and monitoring of applets on millions of SIM cards.
otaSim.otaFeat1Desc: Massive applet management with scalable and resilient cloud infrastructure.
otaSim.otaFeat2Desc: OTA sending to millions of SIM cards simultaneously with real-time monitoring.
otaSim.otaFeat3Desc: Remote installation, update and deactivation of the applet on each SIM.
otaSim.otaFeat4Desc: Status of each SIM in real time: installed, pending, updated.
otaSim.otaFeat5Desc: Compatible with all SIM vendors on the market (Gemalto/Thales, G&D, IDEMIA, etc.).
otaSim.otaFeat6Desc: Encrypted and authenticated communication between the platform and each SIM card.
otaSim.formatsDesc: Three formats designed to maximize subscriber interaction, each with actionable CTAs.
otaSim.formatDisplayDesc: Popup-style notifications with Cancel/OK options. Ideal for offers, alerts and activations.
otaSim.formatMenuDesc: Multi-level interactive menus with selectable options. Perfect for plan selection and surveys.
otaSim.formatDataDesc: Forms for user data collection: surveys, preferences, age, interests.
otaSim.metric1Desc: Works on the vast majority of market devices
otaSim.metric2Desc: Proven superior performance across multiple operators
otaSim.metric3Desc: Dramatic reduction in outbound cost per conversion
otaSim.metric4Desc: The largest SAT Push and OTA experience in the region
otaSim.metricsCompatNote: Compatible with all SIM vendors on the market
otaSim.ctaTitle: Discover how SAT Push can transform your channel strategy
otaSim.ctaDesc: With 15+ years of expertise and proprietary technology, DYNAMO is your strategic partner to enable and optimize the SAT Push channel.
otaSim.cellcCaseTitle: Cell C South Africa: From total incompatibility to €2M in annual revenue
otaSim.cellcCaseDesc: Cell C had 10M users completely incompatible with SAT Push. With DYNAMO's massive OTA deployment, they transformed an uncovered market into an operational SAT Push ecosystem with 80% compatibility.
otaSim.metaTitle: OTA Cloud & SIM Management — DYNAMO Technology
otaSim.metaDescription: OTA cloud platform and proprietary applet for SIM card and eSIM management. Over-the-air installation, compatible with all market SIM vendors.

integrations.heroDesc: DYNAMO natively connects with Telco infrastructure, data sources, communication channels and business systems to orchestrate end-to-end journeys.
integrations.hubTitle: A central hub for all your connections
integrations.hubDesc: DYNAMO acts as the orchestration center, connecting every piece of your Telco ecosystem in a single platform.
integrations.catTelcoDesc: Native integration with the operator critical infrastructure
integrations.telcoBilling: Charges, activations and prepaid/postpaid balance management
integrations.telcoSMSC: Mass and interactive SMS and MMS sending
integrations.catDataDesc: Connect your data sources for intelligent segmentation
integrations.dataCRM: Bidirectional sync with Salesforce, HubSpot and more
integrations.dataCDR: Call record processing for usage insights
integrations.catChannelsDesc: Orchestrate messages across all available channels
integrations.channelWA: Via META Business API with templates and chatbots
integrations.channelRCS: Rich Communication Services via Google Jibe
integrations.channelSMS: Text messaging with A2P and P2P support
integrations.channelEmail: Integration with SMTP providers and email platforms
integrations.catBusinessDesc: Open APIs and tools for custom integrations
integrations.businessAPI: Documented APIs for integration with any system
integrations.businessSDK: Libraries in Python, Node.js and Java
integrations.businessSFTP: Mass file and batch data processing
integrations.ctaDesc: Our engineering team can build custom connectors for any system in your Telco ecosystem.
integrations.metaDescription: Telco infrastructure integration ecosystem: HLR, Billing, SDP, SMSC, CRM. Channels: WhatsApp, SAT Push, RCS, SMS, Email, and more.

security.heroDesc: We protect the data of millions of subscribers with the highest security standards, complying with regulations in every country where we operate.
security.featuresDesc: From data encryption to access control, every component of DYNAMO is designed with security as a priority.
security.feat1Desc: TLS 1.3 for all communications. Certificates managed automatically with periodic rotation.
security.feat2Desc: AES-256 for stored data. Key management with dedicated KMS and tenant separation.
security.feat3Desc: GDPR and LGPD compliant. Data anonymization, right to be forgotten and granular consent.
security.feat4Desc: RBAC with granular permissions, SSO via SAML 2.0 / OAuth, mandatory MFA for administrative access.
security.feat5Desc: Cloud hosting with multi-region redundancy, application firewalls, 24/7 monitoring and DDoS protection.
security.feat6Desc: Immutable record of all actions. Exportable audit trails and real-time alerts.
security.complianceDesc: We comply with data protection regulations in every country where we operate.
security.ctaTitle: Want to learn more about our security?
security.ctaDesc: Book a session with our security team to review our practices and certifications in detail.
security.metaDescription: Enterprise-grade security for Telco operators: data encryption, GDPR and LGPD compliance, international certifications, and continuous auditing.

casesPreview.title: Real results with Telco operators
casesPreview.subtitle: Concrete metrics from operators who have already transformed their business with DYNAMO.
casesPreview.claroDesc: 22% conversion rate on plan upgrade campaigns using SAT Push and AI segmentation across 24MM users.
casesPreview.tigoDesc: 98% fraud-free traffic in affiliate networks with identity validation via SAT Push.
casesPreview.mtnDesc: Smart anti-spam that doubled channel CTR with 6MM monthly controlled impressions.
casesPreview.cellcDesc: Converted incompatible market to SAT Push ecosystem via OTA deployment, generating over €2M in annual revenue.

cases.heroDesc: Discover how Telco operators across three continents use DYNAMO to transform their business metrics.
cases.claroChallenge: Low data plan conversion rates, manual operations, and generic segmentation limiting CVM campaign performance.
cases.claroSolution: SAT Push channel with AI-powered segmentation automation and real-time campaign tracking.
cases.movistarChallenge: Low CTR in VAS campaigns with static segmentation and generic messages that failed to engage subscribers.
cases.movistarSolution: AI-driven audience segmentation and copywriting, personalized clusters by content affinity and behavior.
cases.tigoChallenge: Fraud in affiliate networks on VAS products, with illegitimate traffic inflating costs and distorting metrics.
cases.tigoSolution: SAT Push identity validation integrated with Google Ads and affiliates to verify each transaction.
cases.alticeChallenge: VAS inventory optimization with fixed monetization model not maximizing revenue per impression.
cases.alticeSolution: Highest-bidder inventory with variable CPA and competing products, optimizing distribution by performance.
cases.mtnChallenge: Spam degrading the SAT Push channel with repetitive impressions reducing relevance and engagement.
cases.mtnSolution: Repetition index by product/user/month with anti-spam rules that prioritize channel relevance.
cases.testimonial1: DYNAMO transformed the way we execute CVM campaigns. Predictive segmentation and omnichannel orchestration allowed us to significantly improve our KPIs.
cases.testimonial2: The implementation speed was impressive. Within weeks we had journeys running in production with measurable results. The DYNAMO team understands Telco operations like no one else.
cases.testimonial3: Thanks to DYNAMO we were able to triple our content marketplace revenue. The platform gave us the flexibility to experiment fast and scale what works.
cases.ctaTitle: Your Telco can be the next success story
cases.ctaDesc: Book a personalized demo and discover how DYNAMO can transform your business metrics.
cases.cellcChallenge: Cell C had 10M users incompatible with SAT Push — no SIM had the required applet. Traditional channels like SMS and email had low performance, they needed a scalable, high-impact alternative.
cases.cellcSolution: Strategic OTA deployment plan: applet installed remotely on existing SIMs reaching 60% compatibility in the first year, partnerships with 4 SIM manufacturers to embed the applet in new profiles, and market transformation reaching 80% compatibility.
cases.cellcMetric1: compatible users in the first year
cases.cellcMetric2: of the base integrated to SAT Push
cases.metaTitle: Case Studies — Real Results in Telecoms
cases.metaDescription: Proven results with Claro, Movistar, Tigo, Altice, MTN, and more. Discover how DYNAMO increases conversions, ARPU, and retention for global Telcos.

contact.heroDesc: Tell us about your operation and we will show you how DYNAMO can help you achieve your business goals.
contact.placeholderMessage: Tell us about your project or need...
contact.trialDesc: Access the full platform at no cost for one month. No commitment, no credit card.
contact.presenceDesc: With local teams in LATAM, Europe and Africa, we are close to your operation wherever you are.
contact.metaTitle: Contact — Schedule Your Demo with DYNAMO
contact.metaDescription: Schedule a personalized demo with DYNAMO. WhatsApp, email, or direct booking. Response within 24 business hours.

careers.heroDesc: We are a global, remote-first team transforming the way Telcos connect with their subscribers. We are looking for passionate people who want to make impact at scale.
careers.cultureDesc: Values that guide every decision we make as a team.
careers.valueInnovationDesc: We push the boundaries of what is possible in Telco.
careers.valueCustomerDesc: Every decision starts with the impact on the customer.
careers.valueExpertiseDesc: Deep knowledge of the Telco industry.
careers.valueAgilityDesc: We move fast and iterate constantly.
careers.positionsDesc: Find your place on the team transforming Telcos.
careers.pos1Desc: Design and build backend services that process millions of messages daily. You will work with Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis and Kafka in a high-availability environment.
careers.pos2Desc: Define the vision and product roadmap for DYNAMO. You will work directly with Telco clients to translate market needs into features that impact millions of users.
careers.pos3Desc: Lead the full sales cycle with Telco operators in the CALA region. B2B enterprise consultative selling experience and telecommunications ecosystem knowledge.
careers.pos4Desc: Manage and scale our cloud infrastructure. Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD pipelines and monitoring of critical systems serving Telcos across three continents.
careers.benefitsDesc: Because a great team deserves great benefits.
careers.ben1Desc: Work from anywhere. Our team is distributed across 10+ countries.
careers.ben2Desc: Salaries aligned with the international market, with performance bonuses and equity options.
careers.ben3Desc: Collaborate with talent from LATAM, Europe and Africa on projects impacting millions of people.
careers.ben4Desc: We work with the latest technologies: AI, event-driven architecture, real-time processing.
careers.ben5Desc: Flexible hours, additional days off, and a culture that values team wellbeing.
careers.ben6Desc: Training budget, conferences, certifications and career development opportunities.
careers.ctaDesc: We are always looking for exceptional talent. Send us your CV and we will contact you when the right opportunity comes up.
careers.metaDescription: Join the team transforming mobile communication for global Telcos. Open positions in Product Management, Engineering, and more.
